2605.29161.title: Evolutionary Refinement of Generative Graph Topologies: A Hybrid WGAN-GA Approach
2605.29161.paper_summary: Generating realistic graph-structured data is challenging due to discrete connectivity, varying graph sizes, and class-specific structural patterns. Recent Generative Adversarial Networks (GAN)-based graph generation methods improve edge modelling by learning connectivity and matching class-specific density distributions. However these models still exhibit noticeable deviations such as in degree and spectral distribution when compared to real graphs, indicating that important structural properties are not fully preserved. This work aims to reduce these deviations by refining the graphs produced by an existing GAN-based graph generator framework with a Genetic Algorithm (GA). In the GAN framework, the generator produces both node features and connectivity patterns, while a GNN-based critic evaluates graph realism and class consistency to ensure global structural and class alignment. Building on this foundation, we apply a GA to refine the edges of generated graphs. The refinement process guides synthetic graphs toward closer agreement with real data, while preserving diversity and novelty. Experimental results show that the GA refinement consistently lowers combined Maximum Mean Discrepancy (MMD) compared to the base model, leading to graphs that more closely match real structural patterns. This demonstrates that evolutionary refinement is an effective and flexible way to correct residual structural deviations in GAN-based graph generators, improving their suitability for realistic graph synthesis and data augmentation.
2605.29161.paper_summary_zh: 生成現實的圖形結構數據是具有挑戰性的，因為存在離散的連接性、變化的圖形大小和特定類別的結構模式。最近基於生成對抗網絡（GAN）的圖形生成方法通過學習連接性和匹配特定類別的密度分佈來改善邊緣建模。然而，這些模型在與真實圖形相比時，仍然顯示出明顯的偏差，例如在度數和頻譜分佈方面，這表明重要的結構特性並未完全保留。本研究旨在通過使用遺傳算法（GA）來精煉現有基於GAN的圖形生成器框架所產生的圖形，以減少這些偏差。在GAN框架中，生成器同時產生節點特徵和連接模式，而基於GNN的評價者則評估圖形的真實性和類別一致性，以確保全局結構和類別的對齊。在此基礎上，我們應用GA來精煉生成圖形的邊緣。精煉過程指導合成圖形朝向與真實數據更接近的協調，同時保持多樣性和新穎性。實驗結果顯示，與基礎模型相比，GA精煉始終能降低綜合最大均值差異（MMD），從而生成更接近真實結構模式的圖形。這表明，進化精煉是一種有效且靈活的方法，可以修正基於GAN的圖形生成器中的殘餘結構偏差，提高其對現實圖形合成和數據增強的適用性。
2605.29161.author: James Sargant et.al.
2605.29161.authors: James Sargant, Seyedeh Ava Razi Razavi, Renata Dividino, Sheridan Houghten
